response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal performance matches the provided song reference for '浪曼と算盤' by Sheena Ringo & Hikaru Utada. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was fully utilized for the musical segment up to 01:00, after which manual transcription was employed for the MC talk and transition segments. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to vocalizations with instantaneous transitions during the fast dialogue exchanges to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: きっと、そう浪漫抱えたら
subtitles.english: Surely, if we embrace romance...

subtitles.original: 算盤弾いて
subtitles.english: and consult the abacus...

subtitles.original: 両極のど真ん中
subtitles.english: aim for the very center of both extremes.

subtitles.original: 狙い撃て
subtitles.english: Shoot to hit.

subtitles.original: お願い 勇気をくれ
subtitles.english: Please, give me courage...

subtitles.original: 疑わしい相手なら
subtitles.english: Whenever dealing with a questionable partner,

subtitles.original: いつだって
subtitles.english: at any time,

subtitles.original: 自分 ずっと進化したいよね
subtitles.english: I want to keep evolving myself, right?

subtitles.original: 答え合わせ
subtitles.english: Let's compare our answers.

subtitles.original: 貴方を知るほど
subtitles.english: The more I get to know you,

subtitles.original: 僕はただされていく
subtitles.english: the more I feel corrected.

subtitles.original: 捨てたものじゃない_
subtitles.english: It's not all bad.

subtitles.original: ただ 生きようと
subtitles.english: Simply striving to live.

subtitles.original: うわー！
subtitles.english: Whoa!

subtitles.original: マイクが遠いぜ。
subtitles.english: My mic is too far away.

subtitles.original: 体震えた！
subtitles.english: My body was shaking!

subtitles.original: 何そのタフな持ち方...
subtitles.english: What's with that tough grip...

subtitles.original: え、ロッカーでしょ？ / イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Eh, you're a rocker, right? / Yeah!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: いや、いいですね。スタンドマイクかっこいいじゃないですか！
subtitles.english: Man, this is great. Stand mics look so cool!

subtitles.original: かっこいいですよね！
subtitles.english: They really are cool!

subtitles.original: ね！おめでとうございます、本当に！
subtitles.english: Right! Congratulations, seriously!

subtitles.original: あ、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Ah, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: これちょっとウケるんだけど、もう一回いこう。せーの...
subtitles.english: This is kind of funny, let's do it again. Ready, set...

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、最後のゲストはすいちゃん先輩でした！
subtitles.english: Yes! So our final guest was Sui-chan senpai!

subtitles.original: はい！ありがとうございます、呼んでくださって。
subtitles.english: Yes! Thank you so much for having me.

subtitles.original: 彗星のごとく現れたスターの原石！アイドルVTuberの星街すいせいです！
subtitles.english: The star's rough gem that appeared like a comet! Idol VTuber Hoshimachi Suisei!

subtitles.original: 皆さんこんにちは！ / こんにちは！
subtitles.english: Hello, everyone! / Hello!

subtitles.original: おとのぜの皆さんなんですよね？
subtitles.english: You are all the Otonoze, right?

subtitles.original: あ、はい、そうです。正しい正式名称...
subtitles.english: Ah, yes, that's right. The correct official name...

subtitles.original: 素晴らしい！
subtitles.english: Wonderful!

subtitles.original: ね、おとのぜの皆さんいつもお前らと言われていますけども...
subtitles.english: Right, the Otonoze folks are always called "you guys" though...

subtitles.original: はい。いや、もう今回の『浪漫と算盤』という楽曲...
subtitles.english: Yes. Well, for this song "Roman to Soroban"...

subtitles.original: すいちゃん先輩と一緒に歌ったら絶対にカッコいいだろうと思って...
subtitles.english: I thought it would be absolutely cool if I sang it with Sui-chan senpai...

subtitles.original: まあ、カッコいいけどさ...
subtitles.english: Well, it is cool, but...

subtitles.original: 生でやるもんじゃないよね！
subtitles.english: It's not something you should do live, is it!

subtitles.original: あははは！
subtitles.english: Ahahaha!

subtitles.original: もう私本当にさ、昨日とかさ、「歌える？歌える？歌えるかしら？」って、すごく不安だったけど...
subtitles.english: Honestly, yesterday I was so anxious like, "Can I sing it? Can I really do it?" but...

subtitles.original: 今日合わせてみてね、よかったじゃん！
subtitles.english: After practicing together today, it turned out great!

subtitles.original: よかったです！
subtitles.english: I'm so glad!

subtitles.original: よかったんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Didn't it turn out great?

subtitles.original: メチャクチャ美声でしたよ！
subtitles.english: Your voice was absolutely beautiful!

subtitles.original: メチャクチャ美声でしたよ、お互い！
subtitles.english: Both of our voices were absolutely beautiful!

subtitles.original: え、ありがとうございます！嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Eh, thank you! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: ね、コメント欄もね、うん。
subtitles.english: Right, and looking at the comment section too...

subtitles.original: 「めっちゃよかった」「めっちゃよかった」「相性よかった」ほら、相性よかったって。
subtitles.english: "It was so good," "so good," "great chemistry." See, they're saying our chemistry was great.

subtitles.original: 嬉しい！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: こうなったらまた歌ってくださいね、一緒に！
subtitles.english: Since it went so well, please sing with me again!

subtitles.original: え、あ、そうそう、なんか2人だけで歌うのは初めてなんだよね。
subtitles.english: Oh, right, this is actually our first time singing as a duo, isn't it?

subtitles.original: そうんです。『パンダヒーロー』で4人で一緒に歌うっていうことはあったんですけど、今回2人きりは初めてということで...
subtitles.english: That's right. We sang together with four people in "Panda Hero," but this is the first time we're singing just the two of us...

subtitles.original: ね、すごい楽しかったですし、またね、呼んでくださいよ、奏ちゃん。奏ちゃんのためならいつでも飛びますよ。
subtitles.english: Right, it was really fun. Please invite me again, Kanade-chan. I'll fly over anytime for you, Kanade-chan.

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ！
subtitles.english: Please do!

subtitles.original: 生でハモリという、すごい難しい難題を一緒に飛び越えられて嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'm so glad we were able to overcome the extremely difficult challenge of doing live harmonies together!

subtitles.original: 飛び越えたね！
subtitles.english: We jumped right over it, didn't we!

subtitles.original: 嬉しかったですね！
subtitles.english: It was wonderful!

subtitles.original: 頑張りました、私たち！ぜひともね、アーカイブも残るしね、何回も聞き返してほしいですね。
subtitles.english: We did our best! The archive will be up, so I hope everyone listens to it over and over again.

subtitles.original: はい、ぜひ！
subtitles.english: Yes, absolutely!

subtitles.original: ということで、奏さん、この後もまだまだ続くと思いますが、頑張ってください！
subtitles.english: So, Kanade-san, I know there's still more to come after this, but do your best!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！本当にありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: それでは、失礼します！
subtitles.english: With that, I'll take my leave!

subtitles.original: はい、ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Yes, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: さあ、ゲストの皆さんにね、たくさん盛り上げていただきました
subtitles.english: Now, our guests have hyped things up so much,

subtitles.original: ということで、ここからはソロでですね、頑張っていきますよ！
subtitles.english: so from here on out, I'll be doing my solo performance and giving it my all!

subtitles.original: ということで、まだまだ盛り上げていきます！
subtitles.english: Let's keep the energy going!

subtitles.original: その前にちょっと、準備とお水を飲んでくるので、待っていてください！行ってきます！
subtitles.english: Before that, I'll go get ready and drink some water, so please wait a moment! See you soon!

subtitles.original: ここからは一気に5曲、いっちゃいます！
subtitles.english: From here on, I'm going to perform 5 songs in a row!
